reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle on a fixed world backdrop entity with parallax layer slicing handled by child sprites inside one authored panorama.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_tower_chamber_backdrop_1920x1080.png through AssetServer during floor scene setup and attach it behind all gameplay colliders.
runtime_notes: Backdrop origin stays at the camera center so ladder, mirror, and door anchors line up with gameplay coordinates.
Parallax depth uses foreground at 1.0, middle at 0.6, and distant window glow at 0.3 movement ratios.
No collision data comes from this texture; gameplay solids come from level RON files and Rapier colliders.

context.usage: Primary chamber art for floors that mix beam routing, climbing, and scale puzzles inside the twilight tower.

shape.silhouette: Art deco tower chamber with stepped pillars, tall window ribs, hanging counterweights, and a clear exit lane near the upper right quadrant.

specs.texture: Polished stone surfaces with brushed metal trim and clean glass highlights.
specs.shading: Hard edge violet gradients with amber window bloom and deep black foreground silhouettes.

acceptance_criteria: Foreground columns and hanging chains leave a readable gameplay corridor from x=320 to x=1600 without covering key interactive anchors.
Only listed palette colors plus transparency are used, and distant window bloom never exceeds a 64 px radius around each opening.
